mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, C.ID || D.ID SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, A.SHIP_ID, A.SHIP_NAME, A.SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID, A.TUG_ID, A.TUG_NAME, A.TUG_SERVICE_TYPE, A.TUG_SERVICE_TYPE_NAME, A.START_TIME, A.END_TIME, A.TIME_LENGTH, A.REMARK, A.IS_STANDARD_USE, A.REASON_CODE, A.REASON_NAME, A.CREATE_BY, A.CREATE_BY_NAME, A.CREATE_TIME, A.UPDATE_BY, A.UPDATE_BY_NAME, A.UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD A LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE B ON A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM C ON B.ID = C.SHIPVOYAGE_ID AND C.IMP_EXP = 'IN' LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM D ON B.ID = D.SHIPVOYAGE_ID AND D.IMP_EXP = 'OUT'
A.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD( ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_ID, SHIP_NAME, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID, TUG_ID, TUG_NAME, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE_NAME, START_TIME, END_TIME, TIME_LENGTH, REMARK, IS_STANDARD_USE, REASON_CODE, REASON_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipDynamicId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tugId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tugName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tugServiceType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tugServiceTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{timeLength,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isStandardUse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reasonCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reasonName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_TUG_SERVICE_RECORD SET SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_ID = #{shipId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIP_DYNAMIC_ID = #{shipDynamicId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TUG_ID = #{tugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TUG_NAME = #{tugName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE = #{tugServiceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TUG_SERVICE_TYPE_NAME = #{tugServiceTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME = #{startTime,jdbcType=DATE}, END_TIME = #{endTime,jdbcType=DATE}, TIME_LENGTH = #{timeLength,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_STANDARD_USE = #{isStandardUse,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REASON_CODE = #{reasonCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, REASON_NAME = #{reasonName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
